params.name: Antimatter Bomb
params.description:
On Aug 10, 2070 AD, the world's most powerful explosive was invented.
This bomb is a weapon of mass destruction based on antimatter technology. 100% of the mass is converted into energy when the fundamental particle collides with the antiparticles. According to the mass-energy formula, it's calculated that the energy released by just a few grams of antimatter is enough to destroy the earth. However, although antimatter bombs theoretically are capable of massive destruction, there are still so …
